news.summary: Amesite Inc., a leading developer of AI-powered enterprise solutions, confirms that its operations remain unaffected by recently announced U.S. tariffs. The company is U.S.-owned, with a fully remote, U.S.-based workforce and no reliance on foreign hardware or suppliers. The company's cloud-native infrastructure shields it from tariff impacts as it avoids international chokepoints. The newly implemented trade policy sets a 10% tariff on most imports and up to 32% on goods from certain countries. Amesite's CEO, Dr. Ann Marie Sastry, stated that the company's sales trajectory reflects anticipated demand for efficient, accurate, and scalable solutions. Their product NurseMagic™ reduces charting time by 95% and ensures audit-ready documentation, making it cost-effective for customers. (Word count: 101)
news.headline: Amesite (Nasdaq: AMST) expects sales growth amid trade changes, evades tariff impacts due to US-based operations and tech. CEO sees demand for AI-powered solutions like NurseMagic™ rising.

news.summary: Ario Khoshbin is set to move into a new position on the board of Prollenium, a company based in Richmond Hill, Ontario. In light of this transition, Walter Geiger has been appointed as the acting CEO.
news.headline: Prollenium in Ontario announces leadership change: Ario Khoshbin to Board role, Walter Geiger as Acting CEO.

news.summary: The market saw a sharp decline in futures following President Trump's announcement of imposing "reciprocal" tariffs. These tariffs are expected to particularly impact China, Taiwan, and Europe with significant increases. The Dow Jones Futures took a hit due to the news, leading to a sell-off of stocks from companies like Tesla, Apple, Nvidia, Taiwan Semiconductor, and Palantir.
news.headline: Dow Jones futures slump after Trump announces high tariffs on China, Taiwan, and Europe, leading to sell-off of major companies.

news.summary: In Toronto, Sherritt International Corporation (TSX:S) stated today that the holders of its 8.50% senior second lien secured notes due November 30, 2026, and holders of its 10.75% unsecured PIK option notes due August 31, 2029, have approved certain proposals. The Senior Secured Noteholders and Junior Noteholders voted on the Corporation’s outstanding notes, with the Junior Noteholders joining the Senior Secured Noteholders in the decision-making process.
news.headline: Sherritt's note holders approved transaction to extend debt maturities & strengthen capital structure. Senior secured notes due 2026, junior notes due 2029.

news.summary: The SEC recently announced that stablecoins meeting specific criteria are classified as non-securities and exempt from transaction reporting requirements. These "covered stablecoins" are fully backed by fiat reserves and redeemable at a 1:1 ratio with USD, excluding algorithmic stablecoins. Industry leaders advocate for regulatory changes allowing stablecoin issuers to share yield opportunities with holders. Covered stablecoin issuers are forbidden from mixing asset reserves with operational capital or providing token holders with interests. The SEC's guidelines align with existing laws aiming to safeguard the status of the USD as the global reserve currency. Tether, the largest stablecoin issuer globally, has become the seventh-largest holder of US Treasuries. US Treasury Secretary Bessent highlights the importance of regulating stablecoins for extending USD dominance.
news.headline: SEC says some stablecoins aren't securities & exempt from reporting if 1:1 backed by USD. Leaders call for regulatory changes allowing onchain interest. SEC consistent with US policy goals, backing bill and proposed regulation. Tether now 7th largest US Treasuries holder, extending USD dominance per Treasury Secretary. Bitcoin payments affected by centralized stablecoins.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, the latest DeckLink IP cards are being hailed as the most convenient method to record and stream video directly into 2110 IP based broadcast systems. These cards offer seamless integration and top-notch performance for industry professionals. Capture and playback capabilities are optimized, making them an essential tool for broadcasting tasks.
news.headline: Blackmagic Design introduces DeckLink IP 100G, enabling seamless video capture/playback in 2110 IP systems.
Chinese objections over tariffs have disrupted Trump's TikTok plan.
Stocks of Nike and Lululemon rise after Trump praises call with Vietnam leader.
Nike and Lululemon bounce back after Trump praises talk with Vietnam's leader on Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: A close associate of the president has cautioned that the existing trade barriers may negatively impact American businesses and consumers. However, no substantial actions have been initiated by the president to alleviate the situation.
news.headline: Senate Republicans, including Ted Cruz, question Trump's tariffs, warning they could harm US businesses and consumers. No action to reverse them yet.

news.summary: In a recent statement, RH (NYSE:RH) from CORTE MADERA, Calif., addressed market volatility stemming from reciprocal tariffs announced on April 2, 2025. The company has operated under 25% tariffs from China since the previous US administration. They have effectively transitioned most of their China production to Vietnam, achieving prices better than pre-tariff China rates. Additionally, a substantial portion of their production has been successfully relocated.
news.headline: RH clarifies impact of reciprocal tariffs, operating with 25% tariffs moved from China to Vietnam. Resourced production at better prices.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, Partners Value Split Corp. revealed plans to redeem all 6,000,000 of its outstanding Class AA Preferred Shares, Series 11 on April 22, 2025, following the terms of the Preferred Shares, Series 11.
news.headline: Partners Value Split Corp. to redeem 6,000,000 Class AA Preferred Shares, Series 11 on April 22, 2025.
RH relocates some China production to factory in North Carolina

news.summary: Beam Global has revealed plans to conduct a conference call on April 11, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss its operational performance for the year 2024.
news.headline: Beam Global will discuss its 2024 operating results in a conference call on April 11, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. ET.
Amazon rehires Ring founder to lead doorbell division, per Bloomberg report.
Chinese objections over tariffs disrupt Trump's TikTok plan.

news.summary: A recent event hosted by Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company and affiliate of the Iberdrola Group, took place in Cambridge, Mass. The eighth Innovation Forum was held at The Engine, a nonprofit incubator founded by MIT focusing on Tough Tech. The aim was to bring together key stakeholders to highlight advancements and address significant challenges in the industry through innovation. This gathering was part of the company's innovation week, which saw over 150 participants including thought leaders, startups, universities, and students attending presentations.
news.headline: Avangrid hosted 8th Innovation Forum at MIT, bringing 150+ leaders to tackle energy industry challenges with innovation.

news.summary: The SEC released guidelines establishing "covered stablecoins" as non-securities and exempting transactions from reporting requirements if fully backed by fiat reserves. These stablecoins must be redeemable at a 1:1 ratio with US dollars, excluding algorithmic stablecoins. Industry leaders seek regulatory changes to share yield opportunities with stablecoin holders. Covered stablecoin issuers cannot co-mingle reserves with operational capital or offer yield-generating activities. Legislation like the GENIUS stablecoin bill aims to protect USD status and ensure stablecoins are backed by US dollars and government securities. Centralized issuers like Tether back tokens with US dollar deposits and short-term US Treasury Bills, driving demand for US dollars and US government debt. Tether has become the 7th largest holder of US Treasuries. US Treasury Secretary emphasized regulating stablecoins as vital for the administration's digital asset strategy and legislative priority.
news.headline: SEC sets guidelines for stablecoins, no algorithmic tokens. Covered stablecoins should be backed 1:1 with USD, no profit sharing. Regulatory push for stablecoin changes underway. SEC aligns with US dollar reserve backing initiatives. Centralized stablecoin issuers hold significant US Treasuries. US aims to maintain USD dominance through stablecoins. Regulating stablecoins key to administration's digital asset strategy.

news.summary: A national class action law firm, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, based in Newtown, PA, announced on April 4, 2025, that they are looking into allegations of data privacy breaches at CDHA Management, LLC, and Spark DSO, LLC, also known as Chord Specialty Dental Partners. The investigation focuses on claims related to data privacy violations by Chord. The firm is particularly interested in instances where Chord may have mishandled sensitive information.
news.headline: Data breach alert for CDHA Management, LLC and Spark DSO, LLC d/b/a Chord Specialty Dental Partners. Edelson Lechtzin LLP investigating privacy violations.
Barrick Gold Aims 30% Increase in Production by 2030

news.summary: On April 8, leaders from PG&E will be hosting a virtual event to address customer inquiries and discuss the resources currently accessible. The company, based in Oakland, California, has scheduled this interactive webinar to provide details about their efforts in minimizing wildfire threats. Join the event to learn more about PG&E's initiatives.
news.headline: PG&E hosts webinar on wildfire prevention and safety resources, aiming at 2025 readiness for customers.

news.summary: Nutriband Inc., a company specializing in transdermal pharmaceutical products, recently disclosed their partnership with Charlotte FC by signing an Associate Partnership agreement. The agreement, effective as of April 4, 2025, allows Nutriband Inc. to collaborate with Charlotte FC. Nutriband Inc. is traded on the NASDAQ under the symbols NTRB and NTRBW.
news.headline: Nutriband Inc. partners with Charlotte FC on Associate Partnership, announced in Orlando.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 04, 2025, Barrick Gold Corporation, a company listed on NYSE as GOLD and TSX as ABX, announced the nomination of Ben van Beurden and Pekka Vauramo for the upcoming election to its Board of Directors. The election will take place at the company’s Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for May 6, 2025.
news.headline: Van Beurden and Vauramo nominated for Barrick Board. Meeting on May 6, 2025.

news.summary: Milwaukee's MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) is set to unveil its Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, after the market closes. Investors can anticipate a conference call/webcast at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time on that day to delve into the numbers and projections.
news.headline: MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) to release 1Q 2025 results on April 30, 2025, with earnings call at 10:00 a.m. ET.

news.summary: A national class action law firm, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, is currently looking into allegations of data privacy breaches at Oracle Health. Reports indicate that Oracle was made aware of the breach around February 20, 2025. Those affected can participate in the case by clicking on the provided link. Oracle, a prominent entity in the industry, is under scrutiny for the incident.
news.headline: Data privacy breach at Oracle Health on Feb 20, 2025, being investigated by Edelson Lechtzin LLP for affected customers.

news.summary: In Toronto, on April 04, 2025, Barrick Gold Corporation (NYSE: GOLD)(TSX: ABX) is focused on becoming the most valuable gold and copper company globally. The company, under Chairman John Thornton, has initiated plans to develop its collection of expansion projects. These projects aim to facilitate a projected 30% increase in gold equivalent ounces by the close of the decade, reinforcing Barrick Gold Corporation's position in the market.
news.headline: Barrick Gold aims for 30% production growth by 2030, plans to become top gold and copper company.

news.summary: In Oakland, California on April 4, 2025, State Senator Anna Caballero proposed Senate Bill 555, aiming to revamp California's workers' compensation system by aligning permanent disability benefits with the current high cost of living. This bill addresses the need for reform in the state's outdated system, bringing attention to the significance of adjusting benefits to meet contemporary economic standards.
news.headline: SB 555 proposed by Senator Caballero aims to raise permanent disability benefits for California's injured workers to match rising living costs.

news.summary: In Guadalajara, Mexico, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) released preliminary data regarding terminal passenger traffic for March 2025, in comparison to the same month in 2024. The company reported key figures for March, indicating a notable shift in passenger numbers over the year.
news.headline: Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacifico reports a 5.6% increase in passenger traffic in March 2025 compared to March 2024.

news.summary: Generational Group recently facilitated the sale of S&E Renovations, Inc. to Azure Capital International, LLC, in a deal that was finalized on March 20, 2025. S&E Renovations, Inc. is a top custom residential remodeling company based in Venice, Florida, known for its focus on quality craftsmanship and personalized service. Established in 2000, the firm has been dedicated to transforming homes to highlight their uniqueness and individuality. The acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies as they move forward with their strategic growth plans.
news.headline: Generational Group sells S&E Renovations to Azure Capital International in March 2025. Venice-based company excels in custom residential remodeling.

news.summary: Several companies joined together to sign a legal document backing Perkins Coie and condemning the president's actions as a danger to the legal system. However, the biggest firms opted not to participate in signing the brief.
news.headline: Over 500 law firms support Perkins Coie against Trump, citing his actions as a threat to the rule of law. Largest firms didn't sign.

news.summary: Perma-Pipe International Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: PPIH) based in Spring, Texas, made a recent announcement regarding the retirement of Chief Executive Officer David Mansfield and the appointment of Saleh Sagr as President. Mr. Mansfield is stepping down after a successful period as CEO, marked by substantial growth in profitability and share price. The company saw remarkable progress under his leadership. Perma-Pipe looks forward to a new chapter with Saleh Sagr taking over as President.
news.headline: Perma-Pipe CEO retiring, Saleh Sagr appointed President; CEO's successful tenure led to profitability and share price rise.

news.summary: On April 4, 2025, in São Paulo, Sigma Lithium Corporation (TSXV/NASDAQ: SGML, BVMF: S2GM34), a prominent lithium producer, announced its commitment to fueling the upcoming electric vehicle era sustainably. The company aims to lead in this sector globally and operates under the name Sigma Lithium.
news.headline: Sigma Lithium met its 1Q25 production target of 68,300t of Quintuple Zero Green Lithium in São Paulo, with costs on track.

news.summary: Today on April 4, 2025, SEACOR Marine Holdings Inc. (NYSE: SMHI) disclosed the acquisition of assets from funds linked with Carlyle. The company, a key player in offering marine and support transportation services to offshore energy facilities globally, made this purchase to enhance its operations.
news.headline: SEACOR Marine buys back securities from Carlyle-affiliated funds to boost financial position.

news.summary: A healthcare startup named Vital Start Health in Philadelphia is seeking to raise funds by $3 million to expand its Pregnancy+ partnership. The company aims to scale up its Virtual Reality enabled mental health services, which are covered by insurance.
news.headline: Vital Start Health raises $3M to expand VR-based pregnancy support tools on Pregnancy+ for mental health, now covered by insurance.

news.summary: US Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell warned about the potential impacts of the Trump administration’s tariffs on the economy, mentioning higher inflation and slower growth. Unemployment rate increased to 4.2% in March, but Non-Farm Payrolls added 228,000 jobs, exceeding expectations. The stock market saw significant losses, with $3.25 trillion wiped out, while $5.4 billion was added to the crypto market. Powell's caution on inflation and economic growth coincided with the Dow dropping 2,200 points in a day. Analysts anticipate Bitcoin to see increased volatility as traditional market investors may pivot to it amidst uncertainty. Powell's remarks and market volatility could drive Bitcoin's price upward as a hedge. In the past, Bitcoin has shown resilience and price increases during trade wars. This article emphasizes the need for individual research before making investment decisions.
news.headline: Stocks drop $3.5T amid Trump tariff war and Fed warning of higher inflation. Unemployment rises to 4.2%, but 228,000 jobs added in March. BTC may surge amid market volatility. Powell warns of tariff impact on inflation. Source: X.

news.summary: As the third-largest purchaser of U.S. agricultural products, China has retaliated against tariffs on American goods, putting farmers at risk of financial strain.
news.headline: U.S. farmers face losses as China, third-largest buyer of American ag products, retaliates with tariffs.

news.summary: In Nicosia, Cyprus, on April 4, 2025, Afik has made a plea for the urgent liberation of his father, Mr. Shimon Aykout, a 75-year-old cancer sufferer who has been unlawfully detained in a general population prison in Cyprus for nine months without facing trial. Mr. Aykout, who is facing accusations, has been enduring this confinement despite his health condition and advanced age.
news.headline: Israeli businessman urges US Jewish groups to boycott meeting with Cyprus President due to father's unjust imprisonment for 9 months without trial.

news.summary: The Trump administration called on Republican lawmakers to intervene in California's prohibition on new gas-powered vehicles. However, the Senate parliamentarian determined that this action was not permissible.
news.headline: GOP's attempt to halt California's E.V. policies blocked by Senate due to Trump's request banning new gas cars.

news.summary: Havis, a prominent provider of cutting-edge solutions for mobile workforces, has announced the launch of their newest series of Universal Consoles in Warminster, Pennsylvania on April 4, 2025. Specifically crafted to improve efficiency, organization, and driver comfort in work trucks and fleet vehicles, these consoles are tailored to meet the diverse needs of various industries. With a strong focus on enhancing productivity and ensuring ergonomic design, the Universal Consoles offer a comprehensive solution for optimizing the functionality of vehicles for work purposes.
news.headline: Havis unveils Universal Consoles for work trucks, enhancing efficiency and comfort; innovative solution for fleets.

news.summary: MILL VALLEY, Calif.-- Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust focused on owning and acquiring high-quality, net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has successfully purchased a Burger King property for $2.1 million in Kentucky. The acquisition was part of a sale-leaseback deal with Ampler Restaurant Group. This property is situated in a thriving retail area in the state.
news.headline: FCPT buys Burger King property for $2.1 million from Ampler Restaurant Group in Kentucky retail corridor.

news.summary: In Lancaster, Texas on April 4, 2025, Taryn N. Walker has been recognized as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle, achieving the status of Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence. Her notable work in Personal Injury and Criminal Defense has earned her this prestigious acknowledgement. Walker, a committed attorney, stands out for her exceptional contributions in these fields.
news.headline: Taryn N. Walker recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for Personal Injury and Criminal Defense.
